quote: Soccer is simple, but it is difficult to play simple.
author: Johan Cruyff

quote: Football is like chess, only without the dice.
author: Lukas Podolski

quote: Football is not just a game, it's an art form. You have to be creative, think outside the box, and always be one step ahead of your opponent.
author: Ronaldinho

quote: The game of football is like a canvas, and it’s up to the players to paint the most beautiful picture.
author: Diego Maradona

quote: Football is not about one or two or three star players. It's about the team.
author: Xavi

quote: When you're a goalkeeper, it doesn't matter how well you play; if you make one mistake and it costs the game, it's a bad day.
author: Tim Howard

quote: In football, the result is an impostor. You can do things really, really well but not win. There's something greater than the result, more lasting - a legacy.
author: Xavi

quote: Every kid around the world who plays soccer wants to be Pele. I have a great responsibility to show them not just how to be like a soccer player, but how to be like a man.
author: Pelé

quote: There are always new, grander challenges to confront, and a true winner will embrace each one.
author: Mia Hamm

quote: Aim for the sky and you'll reach the ceiling. Aim for the ceiling and you'll stay on the floor.
author: Bill Shankly

quote: When you grow up playing soccer, it's almost a given that you're going to love sports in general.
author: Landon Donovan

quote: Football is an art, like dancing is an art - but only when it's well done does it become an art.
author: Arsene Wenger

quote: The most important thing in football is what happens on the pitch.
author: Lionel Messi

quote: Football is more than just a game. It can bring hope and joy to people's lives.
author: Didier Drogba

quote: In football, the greatest satisfaction is winning when they say you can’t.
author: Robert Lewandowski

quote: Age is just a number. What really matters is your passion for the game and your determination to succeed.
author: Roger Milla

quote: Football is a game you play with your brain.
author: Johan Cruyff

quote: If you don’t believe you’re the best, then you will never achieve all that you are capable of.
author: Cristiano Ronaldo

quote: I think that everything is possible as long as you put your mind to it and you put the work and time into it.
author: Andres Iniesta

quote: If you're not playing with passion, then you're not playing football.
author: Thierry Henry

quote: Football is a team game, and you need everyone working together to achieve success.
author: Didier Drogba

quote: To me, football is the simplest and most complex game. Simple because it's played with a ball, and complex because there are so many ways to play it.
author: Andres Iniesta

quote: The smartest thing I did is I never gave up.
author: Ivan Rakitic

quote: Some people think football is a matter of life and death. I assure you, it's much more serious than that.
author: Bill Shankly

quote: Football is the only thing that can bring together an entire country, regardless of political or religious differences.
author: Zinedine Zidane

quote: Football is a simple game; 22 men chase a ball for 90 minutes and at the end, the Germans always win.
author: Gary Lineker

quote: Football is a game of mistakes. Whoever makes the fewest mistakes wins.
author: Johan Cruyff

quote: I’m the defender who tries to make the play.
author: Paolo Maldini

quote: I once cried because I had no shoes to play soccer, but one day, I met a man who had no feet.
author: Zinedine Zidane

quote: The vision of a champion is someone who is bent over, drenched in sweat, at the point of exhaustion when no one else is watching.
author: Mia Hamm

quote: I start early and I stay late, day after day, year after year, it took me 17 years and 114 days to become an overnight success.
author: Lionel Messi

quote: In football, the worst blindness is only seeing the ball.
author: Nelson Falcão Rodrigues

quote: You can't just beat a team, you have to leave a lasting impression in their minds so they never want to see you again.
author: Mia Hamm

quote: Some people tell me that we professional players are soccer slaves. Well, if this is slavery, give me a life sentence.
author: Sir Bobby Charlton

quote: Talent isn’t everything. You can have it from the cradle, but it is necessary to learn the trade to be the best.
author: Cristiano Ronaldo

quote: I think football is more than a game, it is a passion.
author: Lionel Messi

quote: Soccer belongs to the fans and the players. As long as I'm involved in the game, I want to give back.
author: David Beckham

quote: I don't believe skill was, or ever will be, the result of coaches. It is a result of a love affair between the child and the ball.
author: Roy Keane

quote: Football is not just about winning or losing. It's about how you play the game and the values you represent.
author: Ali Daei

quote: The way a team plays as a whole determines its success. You may have the greatest bunch of individual stars in the world, but if they don't play together, the club won't be worth a dime.
author: Babe Ruth

quote: Look, I'm a coach, I'm not Harry Potter. He is magical, but in reality there is no magic. Magic is fiction and football is real.
author: Jose Mourinho

quote: I’m not a superhero, I’m not invincible.
author: Neymar Jr.

quote: I'm just a simple guy playing football.
author: Mohamed Salah

quote: Soccer is a game in which everyone does a lot of running around. Twenty-one guys stand around and one guy does a tap dance with the ball.
author: Jim Murray

quote: When people succeed, it is because of hard work. Luck has nothing to do with success.
author: Diego Maradona

quote: In football as in watchmaking, talent and elegance mean nothing without rigour and precision.
author: Lionel Messi

quote: My philosophy? Well, I think it's pretty simple. You work hard, you play hard, and you control your emotions. That's it.
author: Carlo Ancelotti

quote: Football is the world's greatest drama, with billions of people watching and dreaming.
author: FIFA

quote: The true champion believes in the impossible.
author: Usain Bolt

quote: I don't want to be remembered as a good goalkeeper. I want to be remembered as a great person.
author: Gianluigi Buffon

quote: Soccer is the one sport where you can do anything with the ball, and it's perfectly legal.
author: Clint Dempsey

quote: When people criticize me, instead of putting my head down, it gives me energy to do even more.
author: Zlatan Ibrahimovic

quote: Football is a universal language, a passport to adventure.
author: Pelé

quote: When I score, I don't celebrate because it's my job. When a postman delivers letters, does he celebrate?
author: Mario Balotelli

quote: I always thought I wanted to play professionally, and I always knew that to do that I'd have to make a lot of sacrifices. I made sacrifices by leaving Argentina, leaving my family to start a new life. I changed my friends, my people. Everything. But everything I did, I did for football, to achieve my dream.
author: Lionel Messi

quote: If you're attacking, you don't get as tired as when you're chasing.
author: Kyle Rote Jr.

quote: Football is a simple game. You need a ball and a place to play. But what makes it great is the passion and skill of the players.
author: Ali Daei

quote: Soccer is the most beautiful sport in the world. If a person messes up, soccer doesn’t have to pay. I messed up, and I paid. But the ball... The ball does not stain.
author: Diego Maradona

quote: I'm a warrior on the field and a true friend off it.
author: Luis Suarez

quote: Football is not just a game, it's a way of life. It teaches you so many lessons that you can apply both on and off the pitch.
author: Shinji Kagawa

quote: I think the most important thing about coaching is that you have to have a good sense of humor and you have to be able to communicate with your players.
author: David Beckham

quote: Your Love makes me Strong, Your Hate makes me Unstoppable!
author: Cristiano Ronaldo

quote: I think a footballer can have all the qualities in the world, but if he doesn't have the attitude and hunger, then he'll never reach the top.
author: José Mourinho

quote: Aggression is what I do. I go to war. You don’t contest football matches in a reasonable state of mind.
author: Roy Keane

quote: The game of football has never been so quick, never been so technical. The demands on players have never been greater.
author: Arsene Wenger

quote: You have to fight to reach your dream. You have to sacrifice and work hard for it.
author: Lionel Messi

quote: If you are too nice, you will just get eaten alive. The football world is not always a nice place.
author: Zlatan Ibrahimovic

quote: I believe that football can be used as a tool to bring about positive change in society.
author: Yaya Touré

quote: The most important thing? To win playing good football. That's the most beautiful thing.
author: Pep Guardiola

quote: Football is a team game, and it's important to be playing with players who understand your way of playing.
author: Xavi

quote: I don't think football is a matter of life and death. It's more important than that.
author: Hidetoshi Nakata

quote: If you're not making mistakes, then you're not doing anything. I'm positive that a doer makes mistakes.
author: John Wooden

quote: I learned all about life with a ball at my feet.
author: Ronaldinho

quote: Football is the most universal language in the world. It transcends race, religion and culture.
author: Sepp Blatter

quote: You can't score a goal if you don't take a shot.
author: Johan Cruyff

quote: My family is my motivation. I want to make them proud, and football has given me the opportunity to do that.
author: Neymar
